surface_verification.justification: Governance/config + dead-code only: audit_config.json (g2_stoplist), shipwright_bloat_baseline.json (counts), and removal of an unused default export. No runtime / UI / API behavior change. Empirical verification is the compliance detector re-run (G2/H1/H2 -> PASS) + full client suite (1609 passed) + tsc, not a startable surface.

degraded: Server workspace test suite not re-run: zero server source files changed (only audit_config.json + shipwright_bloat_baseline.json, which no server code consumes). The bloat-baseline edit is validated by the vendored anti_ratchet_check.py (exit 0, staged + worktree) and the compliance Group-H detector re-run.
